# fly_ip_address (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io IP address allocation. Import using app_name/ip_address_id: `terraform import fly_ip_address.example my-app/ip-id`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_app" "example" {
  name     = "my-ip-app"
  org_slug = "personal"
}

resource "fly_ip_address" "v4" {
  app  = fly_app.example.name
  type = "shared_v4"
}

resource "fly_ip_address" "v6" {
  app  = fly_app.example.name
  type = "v6"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The name of the application to allocate the IP address for. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
- `type` (String) The type of IP address to allocate (v4, v6, shared_v4, private_v6). Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

### Optional

- `region` (String) The region to allocate the IP address in. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) The IP address that was allocated.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the IP address was allocated.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the IP address allocation.
